name: Q2 2028 NextGen Platform Planning
description: Strategic scenario for Q2 2028 covering Next-Gen fuel cell systems, high-performance computing expansion, and new automated test rigs.

employees.name: Dr. Markus Weber
employees.notes: Lead CAE crash safety validation lead.

topics.name: NextGen Fuel Cell Systems
topics.description: Design and physical validation of next-generation zero-emission hydrogen fuel cells.
topics.objective: Achieve validation certification from German and US automotive safety regulators.
topics.deliverables: Physical test rig safety certificates, FEA crash logs, thermal boundary reports.
topics.justification: Required for a key customer platform rollout in late 2028.

topics.name: High Performance Computing Integration
topics.description: Upgrading local cluster capacity and integrating LLM-based mesh generation assistants.
topics.objective: Reduce average mesh generation iteration times by 40%.
topics.deliverables: LLM model pipelines, cluster job-scheduler, training materials.
topics.justification: Significant engineering efficiency savings across German and India hubs.
topics.notes: HPC clusters configured in Frankfurt hub.

allocations.comment: Running pressure tests on physical cell fixtures.

additional_costs.notes: Consulting support for hydrogen sealing safety.
